nodes.context: Camorra clan operating in the Quartieri Spagnoli neighborhood of Naples, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and other crimes.
Camorra clan from the Quartieri Spagnoli, rivals of the Russo clan, involved in drug trafficking and violence.
Camorra clan operating in Soccavo, Naples, with ties to the Russo clan.
Related Camorra family from Rione Traiano, Naples, allied with the Russo clan of Quartieri Spagnoli.
Related Camorra family from Fuorigrotta, Naples, allied with the Russo clan of Quartieri Spagnoli.
Camorra clan allied with Ciro Lepre and the Russo clan.
Camorra clan led by Ciro Lepre, allied with Misso and the Russo clan.

edges.context: The Russo and Di Biasi clans were engaged in a violent feud from 1999 to the early 2000s, resulting in multiple deaths.
A member of the Russo clan is affiliated with the Puccinelli clan of Soccavo.
The Russo clans of Quartieri Spagnoli and Rione Traiano are related by blood and allied.
The Russo clans of Quartieri Spagnoli and Fuorigrotta are related by blood and allied.
Salvatore Russo married the daughter of Ciro Lepre, boss of the Cavone clan, forming an alliance.
Ciro Lepre of the Cavone clan is allied with Misso.
